message.content:
@startuml
participant "User" as User
participant "CellEditor" as CellEditor
participant "Address" as Address
participant "Controller" as Controller
participant "Cell" as Cell
participant "CellImpl" as CellImpl
participant "FormulaCompiler" as FormulaCompiler
participant "ExcelExpressionCompiler" as ExcelExpressionCompiler
participant "ANTLRStringStream" as ANTLRStringStream
participant "FormulaLexer" as FormulaLexer
participant "CommonTokenStream" as CommonTokenStream
participant "FormulaParser" as FormulaParser
participant "Expression" as Expression
participant "Formula" as Formula

User --> "Inputs block of instructions" as Input

CellEditor --> address := getAddress()
CellEditor --> cell := getCell(address)
CellEditor --> setContent(content)

CellEditor --> setContent(content) as setContentCall

CellEditor --> storeContent(content) as storeContentCall

CellEditor --> compile(cell, content) as compileCall

CellImpl --> compile(cell, content) as compileCallImpl

FormulaCompiler --> compile(cell, content) as compileCallFormula

FormulaCompiler --> input := create(source) as inputCall

FormulaCompiler --> lexer := create(input) as lexerCall

FormulaCompiler --> tokens := create(lexer) as tokensCall

FormulaCompiler --> parser := create(tokens) as parserCall

FormulaCompiler --> tree := parser.expression() as treeCall

FormulaParser --> create() as createCall

FormulaCompiler --> expression := convert(cell, tree) as expressionCall

FormulaCompiler --> formula := create(cell, expression) as formulaCall

CellImpl --> show() as showCall

CellImpl --> formula as formulaCall

Cell --> show() as showCall

User --> Result as Result

@enduml
